message:
fix(fr-command): BLMPOP numkeys-zero wording matches LMPOP (br-frankenredis-04mo)

Upstream t_list.c::lmpopGenericCommand is shared by LMPOP and
BLMPOP (blmpopCommand delegates to it), so both emit
"numkeys should be greater than 0" via
getRangeLongFromObjectOrReply. Our BLMPOP was still using the
old "numkeys can't be non-positive value" phrasing — LMPOP, the
sibling LPOP/RPOP count-negative error, and all LMPOP fixture
expectations were already aligned in prior passes.

The rest of the bead's divergence list is already resolved
(verified: live_redis_core_list 100/100 under STRICT mode; LPOP
count_zero_on_missing / count_negative_error match; LMPOP
invalid_count_{zero,negative} emit the correct
"count should be greater than 0" wording).

- fr-command: BLMPOP numkeys-zero wording → upstream
- core_list.json + core_blocking.json: 3 blmpop fixture
  expectations updated

fr-command 639 passed; fr-conformance 180 passed, 0 failed;
live_redis_core_list 100/100 under FR_CONFORMANCE_LIVE_ORACLE_STRICT=1.

Closes br-frankenredis-04mo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
